description_long: This object is a Samsung smartphone with a sleek, rounded rectangular body and a large touchscreen display dominating the front. The front features a blue-toned wallpaper with a dandelion and digital clock, as well as three physical or capacitive buttons below the screen. The back is smooth and light gray, with a single camera lens, an LED flash, and a speaker grille arranged near the top. The sides are slim and metallic, with subtle button placements for power and volume control. The device is constructed primarily from plastic and glass, with internal components likely including metal and air gaps. Its overall design is modern and ergonomic, suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A modern Samsung smartphone with a large touchscreen, rounded edges, and a smooth light gray back featuring a camera, flash, and speaker grille.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with a blue dandelion wallpaper, digital clock, and three buttons below the screen.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim, metallic edge and a single button, highlighting the device's thinness.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the smooth light gray surface, centered camera lens, LED flash, speaker grille, and Samsung branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim edge with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed 'SAMSUNG' text centered on the back, subtle and matching the back color.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue dandelion wallpaper, a digital clock reading 12:03, the date 'Thu, 3 May', and a notification bar at the top with signal, Wi-Fi, and battery icons.
attribute_camera_placement: Single camera lens located near the top center of the back, accompanied by an LED flash to its left and a speaker grille to its right.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical or capacitive buttons below the front screen (home, back, menu), and a single button visible on the right edge (likely power or volume).
